title: Christmas Themed Ribbon Christmas Card Themed Wrapping Ribbons Gifts Bow Crafts Home Decor (Natural Holly)
features: These Christmas themed Ribbon are ideal for a wide range of Christmas craft projects and decorating.

The Christmas ribbons will add a stylish finish to any Christmas craft project, is perfect for wrapping Christmas gifts, for embellishing cards and paper crafts, to tie pretty bows for an added special touch to handmade gifts or hang decorations on the Christmas tree.

6 Designs Available: 1. Natural Holly 63mm x 10yds 2. Green Holly 50mm x 10yds 3. Grey Berries 38mm x 10yds 4. Burgundy Holly 38mm x 10yds 5. Glitter Poinsettia 50mm x 10yds 6. Rose Gold Snowflake 50mm x 10yds
